title: Building a Business
article_text: I respect my father because he has various skills for his work. He can catch opportunities and thus build a successful business. His son also tries to learn every simple skill from him. The medium level of stock in his shop helps the local economy. Good character and management are important for any business. He hits every goal he sets and can establish a strong company. Indeed, his final plan is to fit the business for the average person. I always notice that he works hard every day. His international manager sometimes visits our shop. The shop does not contain any bad products.

sentences.en: I respect my father because he has various skills for his work.
sentences.zh: 我尊敬我的父亲，因为他有各种工作技能。

words.eng_def: to have a good opinion of someone
the ability to do something well

sentences.en: He can catch opportunities and thus build a successful business.
sentences.zh: 他能抓住机会，从而建立成功的事业。

sentences.en: His son also tries to learn every simple skill from him.
sentences.zh: 他的儿子也尝试从他那里学习每一个简单的技能。

the ability to do something well

sentences.en: The medium level of stock in his shop helps the local economy.
sentences.zh: 他店里中等水平的库存有助于当地经济。

the goods that a shop has for sale

sentences.en: Good character and management are important for any business.
sentences.zh: 好的品格和管理对任何生意都很重要。

words.eng_def: the qualities that make a person different from others

sentences.en: He hits every goal he sets and can establish a strong company.
sentences.zh: 他实现每一个设定的目标，并能建立一家强大的公司。

sentences.en: Indeed, his final plan is to fit the business for the average person.
sentences.zh: 的确，他的最终计划是让生意适合普通人。

words.eng_def: used to say that something is true
to be the right size or type for someone

sentences.en: I always notice that he works hard every day.
sentences.zh: 我总是注意到他每天努力工作。

words.eng_def: to see or become aware of something

sentences.en: His international manager sometimes visits our shop.
sentences.zh: 他的国际经理有时会来我们店里。

words.eng_def: a person who controls a business

sentences.en: The shop does not contain any bad products.
sentences.zh: 这家店不包含任何劣质产品。

image_prompts: A young boy looking up at his father with respect, father working at a desk with various tools around.
A businessman catching a flying opportunity (like a golden ring) with a net, leading to a successful office building in background.
A son sitting next to his father, learning a simple skill like tying a knot.
A small shop with a medium amount of stock on shelves, money signs and a graph showing local economy growth.
A manager standing in front of a chart showing character and management as two pillars supporting a business.
A man hitting a target with an arrow, then building a strong company building with his hands.
A business plan on paper with 'final plan' written, fitting a puzzle piece into a picture of an average person.
A person noticing a hardworking businessman at his desk with a clock showing late hours.
An international manager from another country visiting a local shop, shaking hands with the owner.
A shop interior with clean shelves, no bad products, a sign saying '100% good quality'.
